title: <div>  •  Students who process knowledge better through writing &amp research.</
content:
• Students who process knowledge better through writing & research.
• Those who prefer structured argument-building over open discussion.

📜 Path C: The Undiscovered Genius / The Fallen Angel (Mastery Challenge)

✔ Replaces traditional coursework with:
• Mastery Challenge Exams.
• At least one successful “Stump the Professor” challenge.
a a✔ Requires:
• Research Proposal
• Annotated Bibliography
• Final Mastery Presentation

🎯 Who This Benefits:
• Highly independent “big idea” thinkers.
• Students who prefer philosophical rigor over structured academia.

✅ Why This Works:
• Gives students a clear identity & motivation.
• Adds playfulness & humor to path selection.
• Ensures each pathway feels rewarding & intellectually rigorous.
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 55 (chunk 55/108)
